title: Date Difference Calculator
description: Calculate the number of days between two dates, including weeks and weekdays.
helper: Pick a start and end date to see the difference instantly.

label.includeEnd: Include the end date in the count

result.title: Result
result.empty: Select both dates to see the result.
result.invalidRange: End date must be the same as or after the start date.

openGraph.title: Date Difference Calculator
openGraph.description: Free date difference calculator for schedules, trips, deadlines, and project planning. Compare two dates to see the total day count, week-and-day breakdown, weekday total, weekend total, and whether including the end date changes the result.
